title: Mystic Visuals
description: A modpack combining great performance with great visual enhancements for a cozy and rich gameplay.
body:
![mv text icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d00d3fb944c0d87e502dedab5948205dbc2538f8.png)
# DESCRIPTION
- Mystic Visuals is a modpack that combines great optimization mods for a smooth gameplay experience with mods adding visual improvements to the game. While preserving the Vanilla feel, you can still make your game look better.
  
# COMPATIBILITY AND GUIDANCE
- This modpack was created in accordance with **_Hypixel Allowed Modifications_** guideline and should* be playable (and allowed) on multiple server networks.
- This modpack contains no macro-oriented mods, no minimaps, no auto-sprint, xray and other potentially harmful mods to server owners.
- Even though this modpack is compatible and usable with servers, it is designed for a non-pvp environment as some particles may be distracting. Tested in singleplayer and multiplayer(Private SMP, Hypixel, MCC Island, Cubecraft)
  
 # WHY?
- I have a decent PC and most of the modpacks are oriented exclusively to performance. But realistically, nobody needs 1000 FPS when they’re playing on a 60Hz monitor. 
- I enjoy mods that bring small visual effects and quality-of-life improvements to Minecraft, even if they come at a slight performance cost.
- As said before this modpack adds unique visual enhancements to the game, such as Itemphysics, Euphoria patches, smooth scrolling, visuality and others. I have still implemented some optimization mods to create a great balance between visuals and performance.
